description: 113 - 05-03-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson and Louis Mosley (Palantir)
text:
From: Third Party
Sent: Wed 05/03/2025 6:58:23 PM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson Personal TaOLESe
. ; Louis MosleyThird Party F
Third Party
Subject: The Hill & Valley Forum 2025
You don't often get email from Third Party Learn why this is important |
Hey Third Party

Can we invite Ambasaador Mandelson to the daytime forum and dinner? He is coming with
Louis and we are very lucky he is.

Thanks!

Ambassador - if time permits maybe we grab coffee or tea sometime in DC. I am sure things are
quite hectic but I’m happy to come meet you wherever. Would love to see how to be helpful in
any way.

Third Party

Partner | 13/ Ventures

Third Party

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
